hero.description: Vegan and organic recipes, eco-friendly restaurants, ethical marketplace and an AI assistant with voice commands — all in one platform for a greener future.

features.subtitle: A cutting-edge digital platform that integrates technology, sustainability and well-being.

items.recipes_desc: Thousands of recipes filterable by diet, ingredients, prep time and nutrition, with suggestions for local ingredients.
items.map_desc: Advanced geolocation to find eco-friendly restaurants and shops with filters for price, rating and distance.
items.market_desc: A showcase for trading eco products and reuse, with strict guidelines to ensure sustainability.
items.ai_desc: GPT-based chatbot that guides you with personalized suggestions, meal plans and waste-reduction tips.
items.voice_desc: Voice recognition for hands-free interactions — ask for recipes, timers and conversions while you cook.
items.blog_desc: Articles, guides and a network of people committed to responsible choices. Notifications, social and live bookings.

how.subtitle: We democratize a healthy and sustainable lifestyle, leveraging technology to reduce environmental impact.
how.step1_desc: Explore vegan and organic recipes, eco restaurants and sustainable products with advanced filters and geolocation.
how.step2_desc: Follow AI-guided recipes with voice commands, book tables live at the best green spots near you.
how.step3_desc: Track CO₂ saved, join the reuse marketplace and build a greener future.

items.name: Giulia M.
items.text: Vireo revolutionized my routine. The recipes are curated, the AI suggests alternatives when I have different ingredients and the restaurant map is flawless.

items.name: Marco R.
items.text: Since joining Vireo, our bookings increased by 40%. The community truly cares about sustainability and local products.

items.name: Sara T.
items.text: Voice commands while I cook are a lifesaver. And the reuse marketplace cut down my family's waste.

cta.subtitle_2: Join over 10,000 people already living more sustainably with Vireo.

footer.description: Smart Living, Green Future. The digital platform that integrates technology, sustainability and well-being.

recipes.subtitle: Thousands of recipes filterable by diet, ingredients, prep time and difficulty. Pick one, scale the servings and cook with step-by-step instructions.
recipes.no_results_desc: Try widening the filters or change the search.
recipes.no_instructions: Instructions not available for this recipe.
recipes.not_found_desc: The recipe you are looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.

restaurants.subtitle: An interactive map of veg, organic and km 0 restaurants curated across Italy. Discover menus, photos, reviews and book in real time.
restaurants.click_card_hint: Click a card to see menu, photos, reviews and book
restaurants.no_results_desc: Try widening the radius or removing some filters.
restaurants.geo_not_found_desc: Try an Italian city, e.g. 'Milano Navigli' or 'Roma Trastevere'

restaurant_dialog.name: Name
restaurant_dialog.success_desc: We sent the booking details to {{email}}. See you at {{restaurant}}.
restaurant_dialog.email_confirmation_note: You'll receive a confirmation email with all the details.

marketplace.subtitle: A showcase for buying and selling eco-friendly and reused products, with strict guidelines to ensure sustainability.

blog.subtitle: Stories, tips and tools to embrace a more sustainable lifestyle, one step at a time.

auth.login_desc: Sign in to your Vireo account
auth.name: Name
auth.signup_success_desc: Check your email to verify your account.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's a snapshot of your sustainable journey.
dashboard.upgrade_desc: Unlimited recipes, unlimited AI Chat, booking history and PDF shopping list export. Try 14 days free.
dashboard.recommended_desc: Picked for you based on your taste
dashboard.nearby_desc: The eco-friendly spots most loved on Vireo
